title: Vegan Berlin Guide 2026 - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin is the vegan capital of Europe.** You do not need to hunt for vegan options here; plant-based food is fully integrated into the culture.
**Mitte, Friedrichshain, Prenzlauer Berg, and Neukölln** are the best neighborhoods for finding dense clusters of vegan restaurants and cafes.
**Traditional German food is easily found vegan.** Places like Försters serve massive plant-based schnitzels, and Vöner is famous for vegan döner kebabs.
**Watch out for permanently closed classics:** legendary spots like Kanaan, Yoyo Foodworld, and Plant Base have closed in 2025/2026, so don't trust outdated guidebooks.
**Combine your food tour with history.** Join our Free Berlin Walking Tour starting at Alexanderplatz to burn off the calories.
